description: Спецификации адаптивной навигации для PassGen (согласно ТЗ раздел 3.2, 3.4)

tabSwitching.flutter:
AnimatedSwitcher(
  duration: Duration(milliseconds: 300),
  switchInCurve: Curves.easeInOut,
  switchOutCurve: Curves.easeInOut,
  child: currentTabWidget,
)

iconAnimation.flutter:
AnimatedContainer(
  duration: Duration(milliseconds: 200),
  transform: Matrix4.scale(isSelected ? 1.1 : 1.0),
  child: Icon(tab.icon),
)

screenReader.labels: All items have semanticsLabel and tooltip
